programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. An architect relives her disastrous wedding day over and over.

programme.title: Summer in the Vineyard
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Sequel to Autumn in the Vineyard.

programme.title: Durango
programme.desc: Hallmark Hall of Fame. A young man goes on a cattle drive in Ireland in 1939.

programme.title: The Echo of Thunder
programme.desc: Hallmark Hall of Fame. After her mother's death, Lara goes to live with her father in the Australia.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Series. When a visiting chef is unable to relax, Cassie arranges for a day at the stove.

programme.title: Secret Lives of Second Wives
programme.desc: Lynn Bartlett is a successful attorney and contentedly single.

programme.title: Secrets of a Gold Digger Killer
programme.desc: Multimillionaire Steven Beard fell hard & married Celeste, an attractive waitress.

programme.title: Secrets of an Undercover Wife
programme.desc: Newlywed Wendy Crews has the shock of her life.

programme.title: Secret Lives of Second Wives
programme.desc: Lynn Bartlett is a successful attorney and contentedly single.

programme.title: The Condemned
programme.desc: Nine criminals are placed on an island. Only the last person alive in 30 hours leaves the island.

programme.title: The Condemned 2
programme.desc: In the revamped Condemned Tournament, convicts must fight to the death in a game broadcast to the public.

programme.title: War
programme.desc: An FBI Agent seeks vengeance on a mysterious assassin known as "Rogue" who murdered his partner.

programme.title: Woman in Gold
programme.desc: A woman battles the establishment to recover her family possessions that had been seized by Nazis during WWII.

programme.title: The Glass Castle
programme.desc: THE GLASS CASTLE chronicles the adventures of an eccentric, resilient, tight-knit family.

programme.title: ParaNorman
programme.desc: Norman Babcock finds his paranormal abilities pushed to their limits to take on zombies and ghosts, and save his town from a centuries-old curse.

programme.title: Eagle Eye
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf and Michelle Monaghan star as two strangers trying to escape danger when they are ripped from their ordinary lives and 'activated' as part of a hightech assassination plot.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: From director Michael Bay and executive producer Steven Spielberg comes a thrilling battle between the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons. When their epic struggle comes to Earth, Sam Witwicky becomes mankind's last chance for survival.

programme.title: 13 Hours: The Secret Soldiers of Benghazi
programme.desc: The gripping true story of six elite ex-military operators assigned to protect the CIA

programme.title: Sands of Iwo Jima
programme.desc: Tough-as-nails career Marine Sergeant John Stryker is greatly disliked by the men of his squad.

programme.title: The Duellists
programme.desc: Two officers in Napoleon's army who violently confront each other in a series of duels.

programme.title: First Daughter
programme.desc: A female Secret Service agent (Hemingway) goes against protocol to save the U.S. president from an assassination attempt.

programme.title: First Target
programme.desc: The Secret Service attempts to prevent an elaborately plotted assassination attempt on the President.

programme.title: First Shot
programme.desc: A veteran Secret Service agent must thwart an assassin's plan to kill both her and the President.

programme.title: No Mercy
programme.desc: A big-city cop follows a gorgeous blond to New Orleans to avenge the murder of his partner. Edited for TV

programme.title: The Lone Wolf Keeps A Date
programme.desc: The Lone Wolf, William, is in Havana and helps Robinson retrieve $10,000 that was stolen from her. The money is for her boy friend's release from prison for a crime he didn't commit. William locates the gang of crooks and plays both sides of the law in order to return the money to Robinson.

programme.title: The Taming Of The Shrew
programme.desc: A rambunctious version of Shakespeare's comedy about a rich merchant who has two daughters, one sweet, comely and shy and the other gorgeous but mean-tempered. The sweet-tempered daughter is being courted by several young men who are stunned when her father announces that she cannot marry until her sister does.

programme.title: A Dandy In Aspic
programme.desc: British Intelligence orders its operatives to eliminate a Soviet spy, never realizing he's one of their own men - a double agent.

programme.title: How To Save A Marriage (And Ruin Your Life)
programme.desc: To save his best friend's marriage, a lawyer seduces the man's mistress, not realizing he's wooing the wrong woman.

programme.title: Father Goose
programme.desc: Cary Grant stars in one of his funniest roles as a boozy beachcomber sitting out WWII in peace - until the Allies recruit him to be a lookout on the South Pacific isle.

programme.title: Operation Petticoat
programme.desc: A submarine captain and his supply officer are determined to get their dry-dock sub back into WWII action. However, a bevy of nurses comes aboard, causing hijinks in the hot pink sub.

programme.title: Fun in Acapulco
programme.desc: Elvis heads south of the border, where he's fired as a boat hand, hired as a lifeguard and singer, admired by local beauties and inspired to jump off a 136-foot cliff. Put another way: he overcomes a fear of heights in spectacular fashion.

programme.title: G.I. Blues
programme.desc: Elvis adopts an on-screen persona he knows well in real life-a singin' G.I. in West Germany. Eager to open a stateside nightclub after his hitch in khakis, he takes part in a wager to raise the dough he needs.

channel.display-name: Movies on the Rotten Tomatoes Channel

programme.title: The Paleface
programme.desc: A dentist is duped into marrying sharpshooter Calamity Jane.

programme.title: Holiday Inn
programme.desc: This musical follows a man who leaves showbiz to run an inn, and his former partner and rival in love.

programme.title: Coogan's Bluff
programme.desc: An Arizona cop is sent to New York City to extradite a captured murderer, but when the killer escapes, the hunt is on!

programme.title: Year in Review
programme.desc: Take a trip down memory lane and relive all the box office hits and TV classics that debuted in 1989.

programme.title: RT Essentials
programme.desc: Celebrate 2022 with our picks for the most essential movies and TV of the year.

programme.title: Rotten Tomatoes is Wrong (Podcast)
programme.desc: How do the new Star Wars TV shows stack up against each other? Guest Adam Hlavac joins us to discuss!

programme.title: The Sand Dune
programme.desc: A restaurant on the coast of Texas, is a place where fate intervenes in lives of two young people, Aylin and Jake. In a heartbreaking series of events, two soul mates are forced apart. Many years later yet another chance encounter.

programme.title: Go Back to China
programme.desc: When spoiled rich girl Sasha Li blows through half of her trust fund, she is cut off by her father and forced to go back to China and work for the family toy business.

programme.title: 4 Minute Mile
programme.desc: 4 MINUTE MILE is the inspirational story of a high school track star who falls on hard times. A new coach puts him on the right path but his resolve is threatened as tragedy strikes and forces him to confront everything that has been holding him back.

programme.title: Looks That Kill
programme.desc: The story of a teenage boy who deals with the ups and downs of being lethally attractive. Starring Brandon Flynn, Julia Goldani, and Ki Hong Lee.

programme.title: Final Girl
programme.desc: A violent game of cat and mouse between a group of sadistic killers and a young woman trained in the ways of death.

programme.title: May the Best Wedding Win
programme.desc: Tiffany and her frenemy compete over wedding bookings, despite her not having a real fiancé.

programme.title: The Wedding in the Hamptons
programme.desc: A designer debuts at a Hamptons wedding and is mistaken for a socialite and falls for a groomsman.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori teams up with Million Dollar Matchmaker Patti Stanger to host a series of dates for Morgan, one of her single friends.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori teams up with Million Dollar Matchmaker Patti Stanger to host a series of dates for Morgan, one of her single friends.

programme.title: Heart of the Manor
programme.desc: Real-estate agent Lisa competes with developer Matthew who wants to buy her family's manor.

programme.title: Evil
programme.desc: Swedish filmmaker Mikael Hafstrom directs the coming-of-age drama Ondskan (Evil), based on the autobiographical novel by Jan Guillou.

programme.title: Sioux City
programme.desc: Focuses on Jesse Rainfeather Goldman, a young doctor of Native American ancestry raised by an affluent Beverly Hills family.

programme.title: Captive
programme.desc: In order to escape hectic city life, a young couple moves to Oregon where they buy and operate a small hotel. Their world is shattered when two criminals kidnap and terrorize them. Based on a true story.

programme.title: A Christmas Hero
programme.desc: When a young disillusioned war vet home from Afghanistan sees nothing good in his life, a visit by his guardian angel shows him that his life really did make a difference.

programme.title: Where the Truth Lies
programme.desc: On the night of April 1997, a college student was murdered in a burger shop washroom for no apparent reason.

programme.title: The Vanished
programme.desc: The body of Jin-han's wife whom Jin-han secretly murdered suddenly disappears. The mystery and the suspense surrounding the disappearance grows bigger and bigger.

programme.title: Another Child
programme.desc: Joo-ri finds out her dad's affair with Yoon-ah's mom. Teen girls try to stop it, but make things worse.

programme.title: We Are Brothers
programme.desc: An adopted pastor reunites with his shaman brother and together, they search for their mother with dementia.

programme.title: Envision
programme.desc: Thomas had the perfect life until he lost his wife and son. After a ground-breaking surgery he is given an implant that allows him to create his own virtual reality. When the implant malfunctions, Thomas discovers a dark, long-forgotten secret.

programme.title: Let Go & Let God
programme.desc: Let Go and Let God follows two people from vastly different worlds whose lives are rocked after experiencing sudden deaths in their family. They question God as a result, but find the faith they're looking for on an unexpected path.

programme.title: Closer to God
programme.desc: This modern day Job like tale of an up and coming Christian lawyer who has come a long way from the streets of his childhood. He and his family are faced with several tests to their faith including betrayal, success, death and greed.

programme.title: Nothing Without God
programme.desc: This story is a true tale of a young man accepted to college and struggling to achieve against heavy odds. Because of a drug addicted mother and absentee father, he is adopted by an abusive foster family and then bounces around from family to family. He's been told he is a failure most of his life, until he meets a teacher who helps to change the direction of his life and realize that a negative environment does not define who you will become. To rise above, he realizes that he is nothing without God's support.

programme.title: God's Purpose
programme.desc: A rip-roaring saga of runaway ambition stars Chicago's own Simeon Henderson ("Chicago PD", "Empire") as an arrogant would-be news anchor whose after-word dalliance with the wrong alluring intern sets off a chain of fateful events. Director Kyle Miller brings a grand sense of melodrama to this story of broken faith and the quest for forgiveness.

programme.title: My Baby Gone
programme.desc: Pregnant Emily bonds quickly with her pregnant neighbor Kelly, but Kelly is faking it and plans to steal Emily's baby.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: A former thief frantically searches for his missing daughter, who has been kidnapped and locked in the trunk of a taxi. Starring Nicolas Cage and Malin Akerman.

programme.title: Eye See You
programme.desc: Recovering from the psychological effects of witnessing a brutal crime, FBI Agent Jake Malloy (Sylvester Stallone) checks into a rehabilitation clinic for law enforcement officers in the remote wilderness of Wyoming during the dead of winter. He soon finds himself helping other patients as a serial killer begins killing them one by one.

programme.title: Trespass
programme.desc: Fast-talking diamond dealer Kyle Miller (Nicolas Cage) and his wife, Sarah (Nicole Kidman), live the good life in a beautiful home surrounded by thick woods. Their dream life turns into a nightmare when violent thieves, led by Elias (Ben Mendelsohn), invade their home disguised as police officers. With Kyle and Sarah now frightened captives, Kyle knows he must use every negotiating trick in his book, for once Elias and his men get what they want, the Millers will likely be killed.

programme.title: The Patriot
programme.desc: A deadly virus threatens to wipe out an entire Rocky Mountain town, forcing the town doctor (Steven Seagal) to escape the soldiers who enforce the town's quarantine and devise a cure.

programme.title: Metro
programme.desc: Moscow's underground train system sees terror after a collapsed tunnel causes massive flooding. Subtitled.

programme.title: Direct Contact
programme.desc: An American prisoner in a Russian jail is given a chance at freedom if he can rescue a kidnapped woman.

programme.title: Tidal Wave: No Escape
programme.desc: When brutal tidal waves suddenly destroy many coastal communities in a short period of time, John Wahl (Corbin Bernsen), a Nobel Prize winner, teams up with a Navy officer to find out the cause of the disaster.

programme.title: Hall & Oates
programme.sub-title: Live at The Sydney Entertainment Centre
programme.desc: When Daryl Hall and John Oates took to the stage at Sydney's Entertainment Centre as the iconic bass line of ‘Maneater' began to play, the fans knew they were in for a treat. This duo may have been opening concerts with that irresistibly smooth number for years, but it never seems to lose its magic, and the crowd – an eclectic mix of teens and baby boomers alike – lapped it up. Daryl Hall and John Oates wisely reunited a few years ago after a string of solo projects, and although Oates no longer sports his signature ‘tache, they put on the kind of show that makes it hard to believe they even considered going their separate ways. Earworms like ‘I Can't Go For That', ‘Out Of Touch' and ‘Kiss On My List' were surefire reminders that these guys are absolute hit machines, and their catchy synth-soul classics probably deserve to permeate the airwaves as much today as they did decades ago. These Philly crooners still have it in bucket-loads, so this show should have everyone from diehard Daryl Hall and John Oates fans to kids of the 80's groovin' along in no time.

programme.title: Amor real

programme.title: Vecinos

programme.title: Vecinos

programme.title: Vecinos

programme.title: La familia P. Luche

programme.title: La familia P. Luche

programme.title: Simplemente María

programme.title: Santo y Blue Demon en la Atlántida
programme.desc: Un científico nazi, usando la ciudad perdida de Atlantis como su base de operaciones, amenaza con destruir la civilización con una bomba nuclear. El científico nazi quiere que el Tercer Reich empiece a gobernar de nuevo y si sus demandas no se cumplen, él seguirá adelante con su amenaza de aniquilación nuclear. Con muy poco tiempo que perder, Santo es enlistado para encontrar la bomba nuclear, desarmarla y poner fin al plan diabólico del científico nazi.

programme.title: Pobres millonarios

programme.sub-title: Juventud sin salud, más amarga que la senectud
programme.desc: Una joven siente que su mamá no la quiere y solo se preocupa por la salud de su hermana gemela. Cuando un chico se fija en su hermana, la joven comienza a molestarla provocando que sufra un ataque, como consecuencia, la joven cambiará totalmente.

programme.sub-title: Doncellez y preñez no pueden ser a la vez

programme.desc: Una joven y su padre sufren un asalto y al intentar proteger a su hija él le dispara al ladrón. Los hijos del ladrón deciden vengarse del asesino de su padre, pero el hermano menor no está de acuerdo a lo que se dedica su familia.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: During a visit to San Diego, Tom gets a lead on a couple of unique cars way outside of the city. He and the woody hit the road and arrive at Randy Carlson's house a few hours later.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom sets off in Alaska to check out vintage first-generation Bronco owner Adam McNabb, to discover his collection of various Broncos and assorted off-road delights.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom visits a remarkable motorcycle collection in Staten Island, NY, filled with Harley-Davidson, Indian, and Vincent motorcycles. The collection is so extensive that it overflows from the garage and basement and even finds its way into the living room and dining room of the house. The motorcycles span from 1910 all the way to 1980. We hope you enjoy this once-in-a-lifetime collection.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Ray Evernham shows Tom his incredible collection of his vintage IROC, Stock Cars, and Modified Cars from the early days of racing. He also has a few surprises up his sleeve which leave Tom speechless.

programme.title: The Appraiser
programme.desc: Colin has the pleasure of looking over a rust-free 1966 Dodge Charger from the Arizona desert with all the right factory options.Next, Colin appraises a 1969 Dodge Coronet Super Bee that is an all-original California-built car. Packaged with a 383ci V8 and a factory N96 air grabber hood, Colin thinks this to be an attractive car based on its unique color combo of high-impact F6 metallic green and black interior. But, original cars do come with flaws and Colin found a few in the rear end of the car.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: 90,000sqft or six barns full of dusty, rusty, forgotten treasures from decades of collecting. To name a few, GTOs, Caprices, Firebirds, Blazers, Suburban, Trucks, Jeeps, Broncos, and some pre-war cars. Everything is for sale and everything must go. Message email above, serious inquiries only.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom Cotter gets an exclusive and in-depth tour of the Detroit Historical Society's backroom collection, showcasing priceless Detroit icons. These rare cars are meticulously preserved in climate-controlled bubbles known as car capsules to suspend and slow the aging process so future generations have the opportunity to enjoy them.

programme.title: Will It Run?
programme.desc: The Flathead V-8 in this barn find Ford F1 pickup is FILLED with oil sludge. Can Davin and Jeff get it cleaned out enough to get this beauty of a farm truck running again? BONUS FEATURE AT THE END! Watch an incredible time-lapse rebuild of a flathead Ford V8 engine!

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: BIG NEWS: This is the first video in a five-part series featuring a DeTomaso Pantera, a collaboration between "Redline Rebuild" and "Barn Find Hunter". On "Barn Find Hunter," we always uncover cars that have been hidden for years and delve into their fascinating stories. Typically, we are involved in the initial phase of the barn find story, step one. Rarely do we have the privilege of witnessing steps two and three: the exchange of ownership and the restoration. Today is that special day! Tom's son, Brian, has purchased a DeTomaso Pantera that has been frozen in time for nearly 40 years. The Pantera gets loaded onto a flatbed and taken back to the shop for a thorough assessment of its condition, with plans to get the engine running and potentially turn it into our next Redline Rebuild project. Stay tuned for more videos from the Redline Rebuild Team!

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom travels to Michigan to visit Mick, a previous guest on our 'Will it Run' series with Davin Reckow. Mick has a massive collection of Chrysler 'Hemi' cars, rare one-off models, and some celebrity-owned vehicles, specifically, 'The Fonz's' motorcycle.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom visits Rob Ida's custom car shop, where he checks out his barn-find projects and gets an EXCLUSIVE tour of his one-of-a-kind shop. The best way to explain Rob's shop is not only by calling it a car shop but also an innovation factory. Using the latest technology in metal CNC stretching, 3D printing, and electronic accessories, Rob and his team are setting a new standard for what it means to build custom cars. Follow along as he shows us the latest projects and technology the engineering world has to offer.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: While in St. George, Utah, Tom learns of a junkyard with hundreds of solid old cars, where the owner never sold anything and never allowed anyone inside. Tom makes a few phone calls and sweet-talks his way into Blake's Auto Salvage.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom teams up with his friend Rob Ida to continue the search for cars in New York City. After visiting a few locations, he follows a lead on a late '30s LaSalle, a key piece in a massive collection and one of the best discoveries on the show. Rarely do we come across barn finds in perfect condition that aren't too rusted, yet only need minimal work to get them running. Welcome to this extraordinary collection – 40 barn finds featuring various makes and models, each waiting to be discovered and find new homes.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Chris and Ihor had recently moved back to Canada after living in Texas for the last 20 years. After looking at 6 homes, they decided on one that was in a good neighborhood and hired a Home Inspector to insure that the home that was in good condition. They received a 25-page report from the home inspector, which concluded that there were only minor items that required addressing- The report also stated that the inspector will only report on surface conditions- for all major home systems such as plumbing and electrical, they defer to hiring "a qualified contractor to conduct the inspection". On moving day, some of the deficiencies became obvious as soon as they tried using the shower and fixtures in the basement. The pungent smell of sewage wafted through the home. It was the first in a series of creepy crawly, smelly and dangerous discoveries. For Chris and Ihor, and for the thousands of Canadians who have been caught in the same trap, it will take the frankness of Mike Holmes to uncover the myth that is "the Home inspection", and help this family get what they thought they had already paid for.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Lisa and Simon were preparing to have their first baby and needed to build a nursery and a bathroom. They found a reputable contractor at a home show with impressive credentials and long list of references. A contract was drafted, a substantial down payment was paid, and the 6-week job would be starting almost immediately. Over the next four months, every excuse was given why they could not start the job. With the realization that they may not have a properly functioning full bathroom, and a new born due in three months- Lisa and Simon fired the contractor- and called Mike Holmes. Time is ticking, with a baby on the way, and a bathroom and nursery that will need to be built again. Mike and the team race to beat the Stork!

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Navigate a bad bathroom reno that two Mike Holmes junkies thought they'd nailed.

programme.title: All for Nothing?
programme.desc: Things really heat up for Lisa when she loses Christie and struggles to complete projects without her reno partner while Andrew and Michelle struggle to complete their renovation nightmare.Things really heat up for Lisa when she loses Christie and struggles to complete projects without her reno partner while Andrew and Michelle struggle to complete their renovation nightmare.

programme.title: All for Nothing?

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: The pork shoulder, aka Boston butt, gives us Carolina pulled pork. The majestic beef shoulder (yes, there is such a cut) becomes a Texas barbecued beef clod. As for lamb shoulder, Moroccans cook it in a fire-heated underground clay oven to make their legendary mechoui. This show explores the richest, meatiest, most flavorful cut you find in the meat department: the shoulder.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Chino-Latino originated with Chinese laborers who immigrated to Cuba, Trinidad, and elsewhere in the Caribbean to work the plantations. They developed a unique mashup of Asian and West Indian cooking—the subject of today's show. Get ready for tangerine teriyaki chicken, butter rum grilled plantains, smoky baby back ribs with guava barbecue sauce, and Korean brisket tacos.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: In Miami, our food culture is firmly anchored in Latin America and the West Indies. Our Miami Spice menu begins with a Project Fire first: the grilled mojito cocktail. Next comes Florida lobster grilled with rum butter baste and mango salsa, then plate-burying island spice beef plate ribs. Our grand finale? Turkey adobo with garlicky mojo de ajo.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Steak. It offers an irrefutable argument for simplicity, but it can also be the perfect foil for all the rubs, marinades, butters, and sauces you can throw at it. It's easy to grill, but takes a lifetime to perfect. Let's take a look back on how steak has evolved through three iconic TV series: Primal Grill, Project Smoke, and Project Fire.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: We all know Martha Washington from her portraits as a dowdy grandmother, but did you know that there is new evidence she was a beautiful and passionate wife befitting her handsome George? And that Martha was the secret weapon that kept troop morale high during the hard winter encampment at Valley Forge? We prepare Martha's authentic Turkey Stew with Oysters and speak with expert Patricia Brady.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: As early as 1690, German settlers left Europe for religious freedom in the new world of North America. They settled in the Philadelphia area, and immediately started to contribute to the innovations and spirit of our new country. In this episode, Chef Walter Staib prepares ale-braised sausages and shows us how his German ancestors helped to make America great.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Philadelphia's docks were very busy in the 18th century, receiving ships from as far away as Portugal, laden with precious cargo, Madeira wine. George Washington and the rest of the country was in love with this new wine, which was all the rage in America. Chef Staib prepares Chicken Madeira using this wine along with Spätzle and Chestnut Fritters.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Wild geese were plentiful in 18th Century America and were prized both for their meat and their layer of fat. Chef Staib prepares a typical winter meal of Goose with Turnips, along with Crab Cake with Herb Remoulade. We also visit Harriton House and see how a root cellar was a key part of 18th Century kitchens.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: General von Steuben was a German officer who volunteered to help Washington battle the British monarchy. He instituted a discipline to the rag tag army that made them a determined fighting force that would eventually win the war. Chef Staib prepares Braised Rabbit Legs and Potato Cakes in honor of his favorite Continental soldier, General von Steuben.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: We start a special four-part series cooking in Thomas Jefferson's actual kitchen at Monticello, his Virginia home. Chef Staib prepares Jefferson's favorite exotic dish, Stuffed Cabbage with Fried Asparagus. We also tour Jefferson's gardens, where we learn how important discovering and growing foods was to our third President.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Discover why Rye Coffee became a popular drink in America after President Jefferson and Congress imposed a foreign trade embargo in 1807. Chef Walter shows how rye was harvested, made into bread and brewed to drink. From the kitchen at Harriton House, Chef prepares Madeira Onion Soup, Periwinkles (sea snails), Beef Tongue with Caper Sauce and Pennsylvania Dutch Dumplings.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Coffee came to Jamaica in 1740. We climb Jamaica's famous Blue Mountains to visit a modern-day coffee plantation, and Chef Walter prepares an elaborate Jamaican Plantation brunch.

But first, Ronnie and Froy must wrangle a wrestling ring from an lucha libre school, and Carlos and Matt have to break up a Botox party when they go after a car owned by a upper class housewife. Then on their first repo in Vegas, a live tiger stands between the team and a truck, and it seems like Vegas is more than they can handle. If they complete their mission, the payout could be enormous, but will they be able to resist the temptations of ...

Also, Ronnie and Froy run into an unexpected dilemma when a husband's better halves take the reins, Carlos and Sonia repo a limo from an arrogant lotto winner whose luck has run out, and Froy and Lou track down an RV as a side repo for a mom and pop shop, unfortunately the repo goes disastrously wrong when the RV explodes and the fire department has to be called.

programme.title: Viva Las Vegas!

programme.title: Go Big or Go Home

programme.title: Bouquets and Blowtorches
programme.desc: The team returns from a successful mission in Vegas, but there's trouble brewing within the crew's ranks. Ronnie and Carlos repo from a self-defense instructor who lets his students do his dirty work, Matt and Froy confront a delinquent delivery man steeling flowers from graves, and Lou and Carlos are left defenseless against gang members with blowtorches. Can Lou still keep his cool in the high pressure repo business, or will there be repercussions for Matt and Froy that no one saw coming?

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: “Queer Eye” Cast, “Scream” Star Melissa Barrera, Drew-Gooder Philadelphia Teacher

Then, Drew continues the countdown to the newest “Scream” film with star Melissa Barrera. Plus, meet Drew-Gooder Carlos Aponte, a history teacher from Philadelphia who extends learning outside of the classroom by getting his students involved in their community.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Martha Stewart, Drew's News with Phil Rosenthal
programme.desc: Martha Stewart stops by to whip up brioche and apple bread pudding, dishes on her thirst traps, the one person she's desperate to meet and shares why she has decided to open-up her Bedford home and gardens in her new shows. "Everybody Loves Raymond" creator and star of "Somebody Feed Phil" Phil Rosenthal joins Drew and Ross Mathews for a special Drew's News: Food News edition.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Pop Quiz Week Kick-Off, Anderson Cooper, Drew Gooder Nurse
programme.desc: Drew kicks off Pop Quiz Week, where every day one in-studio audience member will play for a chance win time in a money booth filled with $10,000. Actor Anderson Cooper joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to discuss the latest headlines and his new book, “Vanderbilt: The Rise and Fall of an American Dynasty.” Plus, meet Drew-Gooder Brooke Johns, an ER nurse who volunteers to braid patients' hair on her days off. Then, Drew is celebrating the upcoming NYC Marathon with marathoner and chef Dan Churchill who whips up a healthy fried rice dish.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Beauty Week, Casey Wilson, Drew's News: Ask A Desk-pert Beauty Edition
programme.desc: Beauty Week continues with Drew revealing 100 beauty tips and giving head-to-toe makeovers to deserving viewers all week long! Actress Casey Wilson joins Drew to share her favorite beauty tips and discuss her new show “The Shrink Next Door.” Plus, celebrity hairstylist Adir Abergel shares his sure-fire tips to get that perfect hairdo. It's Ask A Desk-pert: Beauty Edition, where Drew and Ross are tackling all of your beauty questions.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Drew's News with Carla Hall, Corn Kid Tariq
programme.desc: Carla Hall joins Drew and Ross Mathews for food news, covering an avocado ripeness detector and TikTok restaurant reviews. Carla makes frittata with Drew, while Lindsay Peers and Tariq join for a Thanksgiving craft at "The Craft Studio."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Chelsea Handler, William Jackson Harper, TikTok Star Eitan Bernath
programme.desc: Comedian Chelsea Handler stops by to chat and discuss her comedy tour. HBOMax's “Love Life” star William Jackson Harper. Plus, TikTok sensation and Drew crew member Eitan Bernath stops by to share the latest food trends.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Elizabeth Banks, Drew's News with Law Roach
programme.desc: Actress and Director Elizabeth Banks reveals behind the scenes secrets about some of her most famous films and shares why her new film "Call Jane" is so important to her. Plus, fashion guru and designer Law Roach joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to tackle the latest headlines including if you should be truthful about your friends fashion choices to the rise of clapback t-shirts and more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Relationship Red Flags with Martha Stewart, Drew's News with Josh Wolf, Drew Gooder
programme.desc: Icon Martha Stewart and Drew tackle relationship red flags at the news desk and Martha reveals which young star she simply adores. Comedian Josh Wolf joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to cover everything from the latest trend inspired by Ted Lasso, the new parenting trend of sittervising and more! Plus, in an all-new Drew Gooder, Drew is surprising a very deserving nurse.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Drew's News Hour With Gayle King, Tony Dokoupil & Nate Burleson
programme.desc: It's the Drew's New Hour, an entire hour devoted to serving you the news sunny-side up. First up at the news desk, Drew is joined by “CBS Mornings” hosts Gayle King, Tony Dokoupil and Nate Burleson. Plus, Gayle is sharing some items from Oprah's Favorite Things List. Then, the Drew's News desk hits the road with Drew and CBS 2 Chicago Anchor Audrina Bigos delivering you the news from The Windy City.

programme.desc: We're celebrating dishes that make us say ‘Why didn't I think of that?' with our friends Chef Curtis Stone, Chef Jacques Pépin and Sara Moulton who are all cooking up recipes they wish they wrote! Plus – Rachael's own spaghetti alla puttanesca!

programme.sub-title: Hilarie Burton Morgan Is Telling Us About Running a Hundred-Acre Farm With Her Husband and Kids, and Her New True Crime Thriller
programme.desc: Hillarie Burton Morgan is talking about her new true crime thriller, It Couldn't Happen Here! Plus a mother and daughter pilot duo gets a makeover by Clinton Kelly. And Rachael's making over an Italian sweet tart and turning it savory!

programme.title: Rachael

programme.desc: Rachael's making twice-baked, overstuffed potatoes! Plus Sunny Anderson is tackling tailgate food with a buffalo-chicken guacamole dip and taquitos!

programme.title: Rachael

45365 explores the congruities of daily life in an American town. From the patrol car to the courtroom, the playground to the nursing home, the parade to the prayer service, it explores relationships and interactions - with people and their environment. The stories of a father and son, a young relationship, cops and criminals, officials and their electorate coalesce into a mosaic of faces, places, and events. 45365 is a portrait of a city and its people. Directed by Turner Ross and Bill Ross IV.

programme.desc: They aren't strangers to nature's extremes, but Hurricanes Harvey and Irma give Stormhunters Mark Robinson and Jaclyn Whittal a run for their money, as the costliest and deadliest tropical storms batter the US south east.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Throwing Porta Potties to the Wind
programme.desc: The world is a dangerous place, and with wild weather occurances happening every 20 seconds, it's no wonder we never have a shortage of footage to showcase here. The videos we have gathered are guarenteed to blow you away, so let's not waste anymore time and jump right into it.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Steal My Thunder
programme.desc: Weather. Noun. The state of the atmosphere with respect to heat or cold, wetness or dryness, calm or storm, clearness or cloudiness. As in, "I can't wait to see what kind of weather we have today so I can record it for my favorite TV show, Extreme Weather Countdown."

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Oh Hail No
programme.desc: What's windy, wild, and wet all over? The weather, of course! And over the next half hour, we're bringing you some of the craziest moments ever captured on camera! From the hailstorms that destory windows to the breathtaking tornados, we've got it all, right here on Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Water Under the Bridge
programme.desc: Get ready, because the forecast says you're in for a blustery day, followed by some heavy rain, and a slight chance of a tornado. It may seem out of the ordinary, but that's just another day in paradise here on Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Final Countdown
programme.desc: When bad weather strikes, most people head in doors, but we head right into the heart of it. And now you can too, experiencing every thunderbolt, every dust storm, and every flood, all from the comfort of your own home. Let's jump right in!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Slip and Mudslide
programme.desc: Rain. Snow. Lightning. Hurricanes. Dust devils. When these weather phenomena combine, it's usually a recipe for disaster. But on this show, it's just another normal day in the books. It's time for Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Earth, Wind, and Wildfire
programme.desc: We always take weather for granted, but when Mother Nature turns up the heat, she forces us to pay attention. From terrifying twisters to radical rain, we've got it all....and over the next half hour, you'll see 25 of the most insane weather ever caught on camera. Get comfortable, because you're about to experience Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Dust Devils in the Wind
programme.desc: Weather is an unrelenting force, tearing through our lives and homes, with no regard for the human condition. But lucky for us, these humans have been conditioned to take out their phones and record whatever is happening, letting us relive the experiences again and again. And when it comes to weather that is out of the ordinary, that's truly where we come alive. Strap in, because you're about to get hit by an Extreme Weather Countdown.

After avoiding a match with Stephy on several occasions due to suspicious claims of injury, the match has finally been set. Will the bullying finally get slayed? And after weeks of avoiding The Beast, Tessa Blanchard must put it all on the line to prove she is the industries best in an epic Main Event Match for The WOW World Championship Title. Action and chaos in the WOW Tag Team Division continues. And The Fabulous Lana Star stoops to a new level of in-ring-disrespect as she aims to secure victory through her prodigy, The Lioness at all costs. The shocking Main Event will determine who secures a championship title match against The Biggest, The Baddest, The WOW World Champion….The Beast!

programme.title: Sunday Funday
programme.desc: Young at Heart S1E1 — Immerse yourself in a captivating display of whimsical & fantastical artwork. This collection is bound to delight & inspire the young at heart with its imaginative & playful depictions of the world, inviting you into a realm of enchantment & wonder.

programme.title: Sunday Funday
programme.desc: Man Cave S1E2: Mech Marvels — Where the beauty of modern engineering takes center stage and captures the essence of speed, innovation, and timeless design. Elements of jazz, funk, and alternative hip-hop create a mid to down tempo flow perfect for those looking to relax in style.

programme.title: Sunday Funday
programme.desc: Pink Warriors S1E1 — This art collection captures unyielding power of women, mirroring the brave fight against breast cancer. The infusion of pink spreads awareness and celebrates the strength within every woman while the music adds an uplifting celebration of life.

programme.title: Sunday Funday
programme.desc: Living Creatures S1E3: Catopia — Revel in the beauty and mystique of cats, big and small, domestic and wild. Embark on a captivating artistic voyage showcasing the allure and playful charm of these creatures, transporting viewers into a world full of feline mischief and majesty.
